MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION For Partition By Sale
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew M. Zacks and Andrew R. Catterall (415-956-8100) for Plaintiff/Moving party Abraham Newman.
Meghan Miller (415-815-8915) for Defendant/opposing party Phylis Kurzbard.
Kelly Newton CSR #13849 (415-981-3498) Court reporter.

The Court announce the tenative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: SF restrictions and unlawful partition; Partition in kind, by appraisal and by sale; Financial interest; and referee. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM NEWMAN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION For Partition By Sale is taken under submission. Both parties to submit proposed orders. Defense to submit an order in conformity to the tentative ruling; Plaintiff to address 1.) referee, 2.) vacate the ruling, or 3.) reverse the ruling, grant, and send to referee. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
